description: Slide numbered tiles on the grid to merge them and reach the 2048 tile. Simple to learn, hard to master.

title: Among Us
description: Work together to complete tasks aboard the spaceship — or deceive everyone as the impostor!

title: Basketball Stars
description: Intense 1v1 street basketball duels. Dribble, shoot, and block your way to victory.

title: Battle for Gondor
description: Defend Gondor from Mordor's siege in this Lord of the Rings-inspired tower-defense game.

title: Big Red Button
description: There's a big red button. The instructions say don't press it. You'll press it anyway.

title: Blockclaim.io
description: Paint tiles and claim territory in this competitive .io multiplayer game. Block your rivals and expand your domain.

title: Crossy Road
description: How far can you hop without getting squashed? An infinite arcade-style hopper inspired by Frogger.

title: BaBa Is You
description: A mind-bending puzzle game where the rules themselves are objects you can push around to change reality.

title: Zombies Can't Jump 2
description: The undead can't jump — use that to your advantage. Shoot hordes of zombies before they stack up and overwhelm you.

title: Zombies Can't Jump
description: Classic zombie defense: shoot the walking dead before they climb their way over the wall to reach you.

title: Runner Yodas
description: An auto-runner featuring tiny Yoda clones. Jump, duck, and dodge through obstacle-filled levels.

title: Cube Ninja
description: Slice and dice cubes with your ninja blade in this satisfying physics puzzle.

title: Battle Day Brawl
description: Command your soldiers in chaotic battlefield skirmishes across multiple waves of enemies.

title: Define Of Karmax 3
description: Third installment of the Karmax defense series — protect your base against increasingly tough attackers.

title: Drone Wars
description: Pilot your combat drone through enemy formations. Dodge missiles and return fire in aerial dogfights.

title: Luxahoy
description: Navigate a ship through stormy waters, collecting treasures while avoiding deadly obstacles.

title: Sambogart
description: An action platformer with gunplay inspired by classic run-and-gun games.

title: Ninja Kid VS Zombies
description: A young ninja must cut down wave after wave of zombies using lightning-fast blade combos.

title: Space Cowboy
description: Ride across the cosmos on horseback, lassoing enemies and dodging asteroids in this quirky space western.

title: Silver Arrow
description: A fast-paced archery game. Draw your bow, aim carefully, and pin targets before time runs out.

title: Ninja Blade
description: React to oncoming attacks and slice them in half with your katana. Timing and precision are everything.

title: Black Knight
description: Wield your sword as the Black Knight, defending your keep from relentless invaders.

title: Breaking the Bank
description: Plan the perfect heist — crack the vault, dodge guards, and escape with the loot in this stealth puzzler.

title: Big Tower Tiny Square
description: A super-hard precision platformer. Navigate a tiny square through a massive tower of traps.

title: Cannon Basketball 4
description: Angle and power your cannon shots to sink basketball after basketball into the hoop. Physics-based fun.

title: Cell Machine
description: Design and build self-replicating cellular automata machines. An endlessly surprising sandbox.

title: Chrome Dino
description: The classic infinite runner hidden in Chrome's offline page. Jump over cacti and duck under pterodactyls.

title: circlO
description: A minimalist reflex game where you tap to switch a small circle's rotation direction, dodging obstacles.

title: Connect 3
description: Drop tokens to line up three in a row before your opponent does. A quicker twist on the classic Connect Four.

title: CraftMine
description: Mine blocks and craft tools in this browser-based Minecraft-inspired survival sandbox.

title: CS:GO Clicker
description: An idle clicker themed around Counter-Strike. Buy guns, earn kills, and upgrade your arsenal.

title: Cut the Rope
description: Cut the ropes at just the right moment to feed candy to the adorable little monster, Om Nom!

title: Cut the Rope Holiday
description: Om Nom's favorite puzzle game gets a festive winter makeover with new holiday-themed levels.

title: Cut the Rope Time Travel
description: Om Nom travels through history! Cut ropes across ancient Egypt, medieval castles, and prehistoric jungles.

title: Cupcake 2048
description: The 2048 slide puzzle re-skinned with delicious cupcakes. Merge matching treats to reach the ultimate dessert.

title: Deal or No Deal
description: Open briefcases and negotiate with the banker to win the most money in this TV game show classic.

title: Death Run 3D
description: Sprint through an endless 3D tunnel of spinning blades and moving obstacles. React fast or die instantly.

title: Defend the Tank
description: Position your troops and shoot down enemy waves before they destroy your precious tank.

title: Doge 2048
description: Wow. Such merge. A 2048 clone featuring the famous Doge meme. Very numbers. Much slide. So win.

title: Doodle Jump
description: Guide the Doodler ever upward on randomized platforms while avoiding monsters and bottomless gaps.

title: Draw the Hill
description: Draw a road with your finger and watch your car drive across it. Simple physics, endlessly creative.

title: Edge Not Found
description: Navigate the Chrome dinosaur into a web-themed adventure of missing pages and 404 errors.

title: Endless War 3
description: Command infantry, tanks, and air support across brutal World War II-inspired battlefields.

title: Evil Glitch
description: A glitchy platformer where the game itself fights back — tiles disappear, colors invert, and the rules break.

title: Flappy Bird
description: Tap to keep the bird airborne through narrow gaps in the pipes. One tap at a time.

title: Geometry Dash (Scratch)
description: Rhythm-based action platformer. Jump, fly, and flip through increasingly dangerous levels.

title: Getaway Shootout
description: Race your opponent to the getaway vehicle using wild leaps and power-ups. Fast chaotic fun.

title: Gimme the Airpod
description: Quick physics puzzles where you maneuver to grab the missing AirPod from increasingly tricky situations.

title: Grind Craft
description: An idle crafting incremental: combine resources, build machines, and work your way up from stone to steel.

title: Helicopter
description: Steer the helicopter through tight caves by holding the mouse button. A deceptively simple classic.

title: HexGL
description: A futuristic high-speed racing game inspired by F-Zero and WipeOut, running entirely in WebGL.

title: Interactive Buddy
description: A physics sandbox where you interact with a squishy buddy — throw it, bounce it, and apply ragdoll chaos.

title: Just One Boss

title: Krunker
description: A fast-paced browser-based FPS with blocky graphics and silky-smooth gunplay. No download needed.

title: Meme 2048
description: The sliding tile puzzle with a meme twist — merge your favorite internet icons instead of plain numbers.

title: Eaglercraft
description: Play Minecraft 1.8 directly in your browser with no Java, no downloads, and no plugins required.

title: Minesweeper
description: The classic Windows game. Use logic to flag mines and reveal safe squares without triggering an explosion.

title: Mini-putt
description: Play miniature golf across quirky, physics-driven courses. Master angles and power to sink every hole.

title: Missiles
description: Intercept incoming missiles before they destroy your cities. A browser remake of the arcade classic.

title: n-gon
description: A minimal but brutally difficult dodging game. Navigate an n-sided polygon through a barrage of threats.

title: Om Nom Bounce
description: Help Om Nom bounce on trampolines to gobble up candy high in the air. Timing-based physics fun.

title: Papaspizzaria
description: Run Papa's Pizzeria: take orders, prep dough, add toppings, bake, and serve to hungry customers.

title: Paper.io 2
description: Expand your territory by drawing loops on the paper grid — but watch your back; rivals will cut your line.

title: Papery Planes
description: Fold and fly paper planes through tricky courses. Adjust lift, weight, and angle to glide perfectly.

title: Push The Square
description: Guide a square to its target by placing directional arrows on the grid to steer it through puzzles.

title: Rolly Vortex
description: Roll a ball through a spinning tube full of obstacles. Tilt, dodge, and keep rolling as far as you can.

title: Snow Battle
description: Throw snowballs at opponents in this winter multiplayer brawl. Build cover and eliminate your rivals.

title: Soldier Legend
description: Lead a lone soldier through war zones, blasting enemies and completing missions in this action platformer.

title: Solitaire
description: The classic single-player card game. Stack suits in order from Ace to King to clear the tableau.

title: Stack
description: Tap to drop blocks onto a growing tower. The further from center you land, the smaller the next block.

title: Stealing The Diamond
description: A Henry Stickmin adventure — choose your approach to steal the world's largest diamond from a museum.

title: Stick War
description: Command an army of stickmen and conquer enemy territories in this real-time strategy classic.

title: Storm The House 2
description: Defend your house from waves of stick-figure attackers. Upgrade guns and barricades to hold the line.

title: Superhot
description: Time moves only when you move. Plan each action carefully in this innovative first-person shooter.

title: Swerve
description: Steer a ball along a winding track without falling off. Tilt to swerve around tight curves at speed.

title: Temple Run 2
description: Sprint through ancient ruins, swipe to turn, tilt to dodge, and jump over obstacles in this endless runner.

title: The Battle
description: Two armies clash in this physics-based strategy brawl. Deploy units and watch the chaos unfold.

title: The Final Earth

title: The Heist
description: Pull off an elaborate casino heist with Henry Stickmin by choosing the right gadget at each step.

title: There Is No Game

title: This Is The Only Level

title: Toss The Turtle

title: Tube Jumpers
description: Up to four players bounce on tubes floating above the water. Knock opponents off to be the last one standing.

title: Vex 3
description: A challenging stickman platformer packed with spikes, saw blades, and precision jumps.

title: Vex 4
description: More vexing obstacles, more traps, more precision platforming — Vex 4 raises the difficulty to new levels.

title: Vex 5
description: The latest mainline Vex platformer. New moves, new hazards, and the same addictive run-and-die gameplay.

title: Vex 6
description: The newest entry in the Vex series with fresh mechanics and more devilish level designs than ever before.

title: Wordle
description: Guess the five-letter word in six tries. Each guess reveals which letters are correct, misplaced, or absent.

title: Troll Boxing
description: Two troll fighters enter the ring. Punch, duck, and uppercut your way to victory in this silly brawler.

title: Alien Attack
description: Classic Space Invaders-style shooting. Blast descending alien formations before they reach the ground.

title: Balance Ball
description: Tilt your device or use arrow keys to roll the ball along a narrow platform without falling off the edge.

title: Bonncing Dot
description: A simple but addictive game where you guide a bouncing dot through gaps in moving barriers.

title: Black Bats
description: Shoot down wave upon wave of swooping black bats before they overwhelm your defenses.

title: Blox Slider

title: Sir Bottomtight
description: Help the dignified Sir Bottomtight navigate treacherous platforming gaps without soiling his trousers.

title: Brave Bird
description: Flap your wings bravely through a forest of obstacles. A charming take on the infinite flapper genre.

title: Broken Horn
description: A unicorn has lost its horn! Guide it through a magical puzzle-platformer to find the missing piece.

title: Bubble It Steven

title: Bubble Fish

title: Candy Fusion
description: Merge matching candy pieces on the grid to create bigger sweets and rack up a high score.

description: A top-down space shooter. Pilot Captain Roger through asteroid fields and alien swarms.

title: Captain War
description: Recruit soldiers and lead them into battle in this auto-brawler strategy game.

title: Cat On Fire

title: Cave Jumper
description: Jump from wall to wall inside an endless vertical cave shaft without touching the sides.

title: Cheese Lab

title: Chip Man

description: Lasso enemies and sprint through the Wild West in this auto-running cowboy platformer.

description: Hack and slash through a factory overrun with rogue robots before they take over completely.

description: A conceptual narrative experience that immerses you in an unexpected interactive story.

description: Fly a little green bird through lush jungles, collecting seeds and dodging predators.

description: A cape-wearing hero must jump over rooftops, collect coins, and dodge obstacles in this urban runner.

description: A triple-threat platformer: choose to fall, jump, or roll to navigate every obstacle in sequence.

description: A chivalrous knight defends the realm through a series of turn-based combat encounters.

description: Launch a rocket lizard into the sky, upgrading engines and fins to reach greater and greater heights.

description: Help the Roonks, a family of goofy creatures, solve physics puzzles using their unique abilities.

description: A manic reflex-based game where everything accelerates. Keep up or be overwhelmed by the chaos.

description: A massive monster roams the city devouring everything in sight. Guide it to eat as much as possible.

title: Mouse Jump
description: A tiny mouse must leap from platform to platform without slipping off the narrow ledges.

title: NEST
description: Build and maintain a bird's nest, collecting twigs and guarding eggs from predators.

title: Ninja Run
description: Sprint, wall-jump, and dash through obstacle courses as a fleet-footed ninja — speed is everything.

description: Follow your ninja path through stealth and combat missions, mastering the way of the shadow warrior.

title: Ojello
description: Stretch and squish the Ojello blob to fit through tight gaps in this physics-based puzzle game.

title: Pacman
description: The iconic arcade classic. Eat all the dots, dodge four ghosts, and use power pellets to turn the tables.

title: Pancake Boss
description: Stack pancakes as perfectly as possible for demanding breakfast customers before they lose patience.

description: A flash-speed panda platformer — react faster than the eye can follow to navigate each level.

title: Pebble Boy
description: A young boy made of pebbles rolls through levels collecting gems and avoiding water that would dissolve him.

title: Penguin
description: Guide a waddling penguin safely across icy platforms, fishing holes, and polar-bear hazards.

title: Pie Attack
description: Defend your face from an endless barrage of incoming pies by dodging left and right.

title: Pigeon
description: Be a pigeon loose in the city. Poop on cars, steal sandwiches, and cause maximum urban chaos.

title: Piggy Roll
description: Roll a jolly pig down sloping levels, collecting coins and using its hefty weight to smash obstacles.

title: Pirate Kid
description: A pint-sized pirate sails from island to island, fighting sea monsters and collecting buried treasure.

title: Pitana
description: Swing a piñata-shaped character through candy-filled obstacle courses to reach the end goal.

title: Portal Runner
description: Sprint through levels and leap into portals to teleport around deadly hazards.

title: Pyramid Jump
description: Leap between the steps of an ancient pyramid, climbing higher with every well-timed jump.

description: A mischievous raccoon dashes through trash-can-lined streets collecting garbage bags in this runner.

title: Rain Box
description: Direct falling raindrops into colored buckets to score points. A calming but precise reflex game.

title: Rocket Pop
description: Blast off ice-cream rockets and pop floating popsicle clusters by matching flavors.

title: Rope Ninja
description: Swing from rope to rope like a ninja, building huge momentum to fling yourself across chasms.

title: Run Pixie Run
description: A tiny pixie sprints through an enchanted forest. Avoid mushrooms and fly over tree roots to survive.

title: Sally BBQ
description: Help Sally manage a busy barbecue grill: take orders, flip patties, and serve before customers leave.

description: Explore a world made of floating islands, hopping between them and uncovering secrets in the clouds.

description: Race your aircraft against opponents through cloud-filled sky courses, hitting boost pads to surge ahead.

description: Drive a cable car along sky-high wires, collecting passengers and avoiding birds and power lines.

title: Slot Chicken

description: Crush and merge falling squares of the same color to keep the grid clear and rack up a high score.

description: A panda made of sticks overcomes bamboo-themed obstacles in this charming precision platformer.

title: Stick Samurai

description: A gooey blob sticks to surfaces and must stretch and fling itself through puzzle-filled levels.

title: Strange Space
description: Drift through outer space in a broken spaceship, solving physics puzzles to restore power and escape.

description: A colossal mech stomps through a ruined city. Guide it forward, jumping over crumbling buildings.

title: Tooncup

title: Trailblazer
description: Blaze a new trail across unexplored territory — clear obstacles and pave the way for settlers.

title: Trash Dash
description: A raccoon dashes through alleys overflowing with trash, collecting bags and hurdling obstacles.

title: Troll Boxing
description: Two troll fighters enter the ring. Punch, duck, and uppercut your way to victory in this silly brawler.

title: Wood Block

description: A vertical space shooter with dynamic music — shoot in rhythm with the beat for bonus multipliers.

title: Zapaliens

description: Build a survivor camp and fend off zombie hordes in this post-apocalyptic strategy defense game.

title: Zoon Stuner
